name: kde-computer-use
description: KDE Wayland foreground Computer Use tools for Codex, using KWin metadata, KWin ScreenShot2 observation, KDE StatusNotifierItem tray activation, and KDE RemoteDesktop portal input.

interface.shortDescription: Observe and control the foreground KDE Wayland desktop
interface.longDescription: Computer Use gives Codex owner-authorized foreground control on KDE Wayland. It observes the visible desktop through KWin ScreenShot2 or the KDE RemoteDesktop portal, lists virtual desktops and windows through KWin scripting, restores tray-hidden apps through KDE StatusNotifierItem DBus activation, and injects pointer and keyboard input through the pre-authorized KDE RemoteDesktop portal. It does not implement background clicking or hidden per-app control.
defaultPrompt: Open an app and operate it
